daily_verse_count_goal.title: Daily Verse Count Goal
daily_verse_count_goal.description: Your Daily Verse Count Goal is the number of verses you want to read each day. My Bible Log will show your progress toward this goal.
daily_verse_count_goal.read_in_year: Read the Bible in a year
daily_verse_count_goal.read_by_specific_date: Read the Bible by a specific date
daily_verse_count_goal.calculated_goal: To finish by your goal date, you'll need to read {dailyGoal} verses per day ({days} days).
daily_verse_count_goal.change_hint: You can change this setting at any time.

messaging.daily_verse_count_goal_saved_successfull: Daily verse count goal saved successfully.
messaging.unable_to_save_daily_verse_count_goal: Unable to save. Please enter a number between 1 and 1111.
